results.code:
1069 
1070         card += f"""
1071 ## Confidence Intervals
1072 - Method: Bootstrap ensemble ({len(self._bootstrap_models)} models)
1073 - Coverage: 90% CI (5th-95th percentile)
1074 - Reject predictions with CI width > 60 points
1075 
1076 ## Limitations
1077 1. **Small training set**: {metrics.get('training_samples', 0)} cases — model may underperform on unseen CVE categories
1078 2. **Temporal bias**: Training data biased towards 2021-2025 CVEs; emerging attack patterns may not be captured
1079 3. **No code-level features**: Model uses metadata only; does not analyze actual source code
1080 4. **Chain exploit detection**: Chain exploit feature is binary; does not model chain complexity
1081 5. **Asset criticality dependency**: Requires accurate asset_criticality input; garbage-in-garbage-out
1082 6. **No online learning**: Model is static; requires periodic retraining with updated golden dataset
1083 
1084 ## Ethical Considerations
1085 - Model should not be used as sole basis for security decisions
1086 - False negatives (missed critical vulns) are more dangerous than false positives
1087 - Model is calibrated to over-predict risk for KEV entries (safety margin)
1088 
1089 ## Update Policy
1090 - Retrain when golden dataset updated with >5 new cases
1091 - Retrain when validation accuracy drops >5% from baseline
1092 - Model version is bumped for any hyperparameter change
1093 """
1094         with open(card_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
